channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How to Get Emergency Care Without Insurance
10 Strategies to Reduce Prescription and Treatment Expenses
item.description: Healthcare costs are at record highs and climbing. Follow these tips to maximize the value of every dollar you spend.

item.title: Money-Saving Advice from an Efficiency Expert

2MM: Pharma Roundup – Pfizer’s $10.5B Innovent Oncology Deal, Guselkumab (Tremfya) Gets Broader Psoriatic Arthritis Label, Venetoclax (Venclyxto) Expands First-Line CLL Options, and Seladelpar (Livdelzi) Advances in Primary Biliary Cholangitis
item.description: Pfizer and Innovent deepen the China biotech licensing wave with a major oncology collaboration.
